title: DAP ur Homies!
description: You can now DAP ur Homies! YEET them Catch them and more Coop Features
body:
## I Added **DAPPING** Please Support me by [SUBSCRIBE To my Youtube ](https://www.youtube.com/@anteryo) or donating to my [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/anteryo) It motivates me TO UPDATE MOD WITH MORE FEATURES!🙏❤️ # REPORT BUGS 1.21.11 and 26.1 EARLY ACCESS OUT full release soon! **If u find a Bug Please Comment it on my latest short or report on discord [https://discord.gg/2mDeMR7mY7](https://discord.gg/2mDeMR7mY7)** ### Credit to @zaptrem4 and @itsfirecat for 1.21.11 port ### 📦 Requirements - **Player Animation Library:** Required for all versions # **FOR NEOFORGE ONLY** - FOR NEOFORGE U NEED THESE MODS [CLick HERE!](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) - AND [THIS MOD](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api) TOO

#

Dap YOUR HOMIES!🙏 **G** - Hold to charge, release near another player - 5 tiers based on charge level and speed - **Perfect timing** (40ms window) = bonus effects! - Higher tiers = bigger explosions and knockback | Tier | Requirements | Effect | |------|--------------|--------| | 1 - Weak | Low charge | Small particles | | 2 - Nice | Medium charge | Knockback + particles | | 3 - Great | High charge | Explosion + knockback | | 4 - Legendary | Full charge + high speed | Massive explosion! | | 5 - Fire Dap | Full charge + sprinting 2 sec | Fire sphere explosion! | ### ⭐ Perfect Legendary Dap ![LEGENDARY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f1cca7ffb7299797bde7573efc40fecef0f0dd5.gif) **The ultimate achievement! Requires:** - Both players charging - Both moving 10+ m/s - Perfect 40ms timing - CAUSES A LARGE SHOKWAVE THAT DESTROYES EVERYTHING. (**Do it at ur own risk**) ### YEEET ![Make a scarifice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6690db21e9dfeb576c565aab0746fd80dd0ca27b.gif) **You can now make a SACRIFICE!** - Press R and tell your firend to right click you - Yeet while there on fire and they become a **BOMB**! - Yeet them at creeper for **free diamond**s (totaly real) ## BOOST ![Boost them upward](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/950da7e029c59afc0d86bc0551bc1e8a934f8603.gif) - HOLD both Shift and right click to boost your friend - Pressing R last secound will preform A CATCH like water clutch. ## CLICK SPOILER IF U WANT ruin UR FRIENDSHIP! ##

Spoiler ### WOW YOU ACTUALY CLICKED IT (HAVE FUN🤣) ### # Mahito Potion **Craft it** ![MAHITO CRAFTING RECIPE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55b909df43c5d282803421ffff28c5f04d0e085d_0.webp) - Drink potion and dap your friend (look at galery to see what potion does 😭🙏) ### 💀 Squash ![squash](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a094d41fabc1347b5ced9b0adf21c614e78ce5b2.gif) **Land on players from above while charging dap! **- Fall 20+ blocks while charging - Land on another player - 25 seconds of being flattened - Drops their items, gives nausea

❤️ Support The Mod

Donations help fund future updates and new features.

### 📦 Server to play with ur homies (use my code to support the mod when checkout)

### 📦 Requirements - **Fabric API:** Required - **[CLICK HERE Required (for animations) ](https://modrinth.com/mod/player-animation-library) :** Required (for animations) ## 🤝 Multiplayer This mod is designed for **multiplayer**! All features require at least 2 players. Works on: - Dedicated servers (all players need the mod) - LAN worlds - IF U HAVE NO FRIENDS THERE WILL BE AN UPDATE FOR U GUYS ## 📝 Credits - **Player Animation Library** by ZigyTheBird --- **Enjoy playing with your friends!** 🎮✨
